revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite news |_exclude=column, day_of_week, p, pp, page, pages, page_number, page_numbers, section, subscription, _debug |_alias-map=articlename:title, section:department |url-access={{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{subscription|}}}|none||subscription}}}} |newspaper=The Times |location=London |at={{#switch:{{#if:{{{column|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}} |111 |110=col {{{column}}}, p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |101=col {{{column}}}, pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |100=col {{{column}}} |011 |010=p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |001=pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |000= }} }}{{#if:{{{articlename|}}}{{{page_number|}}}{{{page_numbers|}}}{{{section|}}}| template uses deprecated parameter(s) ([[Template:Cite newspaper The Times|help]])}} {{template doc}}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite news |_exclude=column, day_of_week, p, pp, page, pages, page_number, page_numbers, section, subscription, _debug |_alias-map=articlename:title, section:department |url-access={{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{subscription|}}}|none||subscription}}}} |newspaper=The Times |location=London |at={{#switch:{{#if:{{{column|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}} |111 |110=col {{{column}}}, p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |101=col {{{column}}}, pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |100=col {{{column}}} |011 |010=p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |001=pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |000= }} }}{{#if:{{{articlename|}}}{{{page_number|}}}{{{page_numbers|}}}{{{section|}}}| template uses deprecated parameter(s) ([[Template:Cite newspaper The Times|help]])}} {{template doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite news |_exclude=column, day_of_week, p, pp, page, pages, page_number, page_numbers, section, subscription, _debug |_alias-map=articlename:title, section:department |url-access={{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{subscription|}}}|none||subscription}}}} |newspaper=The Times |location=London |at={{#switch:{{#if:{{{column|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}} |111 |110=col {{{column}}}, p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |101=col {{{column}}}, pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |100=col {{{column}}} |011 |010=p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |001=pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |000= }} }}{{#if:{{{articlename|}}}{{{page_number|}}}{{{page_numbers|}}}{{{section|}}}| template uses deprecated parameter(s) ([[Template:Cite newspaper The Times|help]])}} {{template doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_newspaper_The_Times here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:template wrapper|{{#if:{{{_debug|}}}|list|wrap}}|_template=cite news |_exclude=column, day_of_week, p, pp, page, pages, page_number, page_numbers, section, subscription, _debug |_alias-map=articlename:title, section:department |url-access={{#if:{{{url|}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{subscription|}}}|none||subscription}}}} |newspaper=The Times |location=London |at={{#switch:{{#if:{{{column|}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}}{{#if:{{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}}|1|0}} |111 |110=col {{{column}}}, p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |101=col {{{column}}}, pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |100=col {{{column}}} |011 |010=p. {{{page_number|{{{page|{{{p|}}}}}}}}} |001=pp. {{{page_numbers|{{{pages|{{{pp|}}}}}}}}} |000= }} }}{{#if:{{{articlename|}}}{{{page_number|}}}{{{page_numbers|}}}{{{section|}}}| template uses deprecated parameter(s) ([[Template:Cite newspaper The Times|help]])}} {{template doc}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
